name: @aikdna/decision_state
description: Judge whether a meeting, discussion, or planning session has produced an actionable decision — or just discussion. Helps AI agents distinguish progress from the appearance of progress.
core_insight: Discussion is not decision. Broad agreement is not commitment.

not_for: automated assignment of accountability without human confirmation
requires_human_review_when: the classification will be used to assign work to named people
the meeting context includes formal governance, legal, or compliance rules
team policy treats silence, RFC timeout, or on-call handoff as explicit approval
known_failure_modes: over-classifying routine status updates as unresolved decisions
missing domain-specific governance rules where silence has formal meaning
treating social alignment as operational commitment
